finding_results.notes: Compressed the pre-Carrow fluency sequence to one ordinary-magic literacy beat at breakfast and one offensive-magic foreshadowing beat outside Charms. Removed the interchangeable napkin and house-point-hourglass demonstrations while preserving Miren's empty-seat beat as emotional fallout rather than another proof-of-fluency example.

summary: Compressed the opening catalogue of substrate-fluency demonstrations so the chapter reaches Carrow's corridor torture sooner while retaining the ordinary-literacy and offensive-magic beats the packet required.
